full_text:
Qin Mi (Zichi) 秦宓 (子敕)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qin Mi (秦宓), styledZichi (子敕), was born in Guanghan. Rebuked Jian Yong for his arrogance, thrown in jail for opposing the invasion of Wu. Qin Mi was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom. Qin Mi lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
